case_title: ALI SHEREFA VS. FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR DEC-17-2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAY-11-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-16-2012 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ALI SHEREFA'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCTOBER 26, 2012 AT 9:00 AM. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS IN COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 16, 2012 AT 4:00 PM. KATHERINE HUIBONHOA, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-14-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-05-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS Off calendar per the request of the moving party. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/MJM)

Mtn To Compel Discovery, Memo Of P & A Dec; List Of Disputed Discovery And Pos
Off Calendar Oct-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF ALI SHEREFA'S Motion To Compel Discovery is DENIED. Moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The Court continued this matter from October 16, 2012 with a request that moving party provide courtesy copies, but the Court still has not received any courtesy copies. Prevailing party to prepare the order. Katherine Huibonhoa, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

Mtn To Compel Discovery, Memo Of P & A Dec; List Of Disputed Discovery And Pos
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Continued To Oct-26-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF ALI SHEREFA'S Motion To Compel Discovery is continued on the court's own motion to October 26, 2012 at 9:00 am. Moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and is ordered to provide courtesy copies to Department 302 no later than October 16, 2012 at 4:00 pm. Katherine Huibonhoa, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Set For Trial On Dec-17-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
